name: coverage matrix: identical tree input produces byte-identical coverage-matrix.json across runs (deterministic)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree "$PWD/tree" --emit "$PWD/c1.json" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree "$PWD/tree" --emit "$PWD/c2.json" && diff c1.json c2.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-ts-001, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: google-tsguide, class: published-standard, section_id: "5.2", url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml
